description_long: This is a rectangular wooden cabinet with a light natural finish, featuring two blue doors on the front. The left door is closed, while the right door is open, revealing three spacious shelves inside. The cabinet has metallic handles on each door, and the shelves are open and unobstructed, suitable for storing various items. The top and sides are flat, with the back and bottom constructed from the same wood material. There are no visible glass panels or decorative elements, giving it a functional and modern appearance suitable for urban environments such as offices, garages, or public spaces.
description: A light wood cabinet with two blue doors and three open shelves, featuring metallic handles and a modern, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both blue doors, one open to reveal three shelves and the interior storage space.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thickness of the cabinet and the open right door extending outward.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the arrangement of the shelves and the open door, with the cabinet's rectangular shape clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the closed left door and the cabinet's depth.
